title: Fix inner class navigation in Editor
body:
This PR fixes the issue where an inner class script is attached to a node. Selecting a script from `SceneTree` or `Inspector` opens an empty script file.
Related use case of an inner class https://github.com/godotengine/godot-proposals/issues/14285
<details>
<summary>Before this PR:</summary>

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ae22c837-e289-4cb8-98f1-2b1fa79980b1
</details>
<details>
<summary>After this PR:</summary>

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7ac8c68a-6c3b-44b0-be2c-3572ffd240d7
</details>
author: DexterFstone

issue_comments.body:
With this PR: Is it possible to actually save the scene, close it, reopen it and still have everything in a valid state?

Because if not, I don't see the benefit in suppressing error messages for something that does not work.

> With this PR: Is it possible to actually save the scene, close it, reopen it and still have everything in a valid state?

What do you mean by valid state?

I mean that inner class scripts can't be correctly serialized into a packed scene:

[Screencast From 2026-02-21 15-55-14.webm](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ac66a6b3-237a-46b9-9431-77e77665ef91)

Basically the same issue as with inner class resources. So IMO there really is no point in supporting them in the inspector if they will corrupt the scene anyway.

> I mean that inner class scripts can't be correctly serialized into a packed scene:
> 
>  Screencast.From.2026-02-21.15-55-14.webm 
> Basically the same issue as with inner class resources. So IMO there really is no point in supporting them in the inspector if they will corrupt the scene anyway.

I will try to see if it is possible to fix it; if not, I will close this PR

label_notes: Symptom-fix rejected as not-root-cause Godot case. DexterFstone (CONTRIBUTOR, 22 prior PRs) substantial fix (+70/-24) for inner-class script navigation showing empty file in editor. HolonProduction (MEMBER) demonstrated with screencast that inner class scripts cannot be correctly serialized into packed scenes — making the editor-navigation fix actively harmful (would encourage users to attach inner-class scripts that corrupt scenes). External-maintainer-shown deeper bug parallels curl#21226 (CI-failure-driven self-close) and ruff#22067 (sharkdp soundness counterexample). DexterFstone accepted feedback and self-closed 2h later. Different from miguelrsgoncalves#116422 (wrong abstraction layer): here the diagnosis was incomplete — fix addresses symptom while underlying serialization bug remains. Adds Godot case + 'symptom-fix-not-root-cause' sub-pattern to rejected_quality class.
